MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. ANDREW CHEW OF BRAYTON & PURCELL, LLP, TEL. NO. 898-1555 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. JAS DHILLON OF K & L GATES, TEL. NO. 249-1047 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY CRANE COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CRANE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT THROUGH HIS DECLARATION, THE OBJECTION TO WHICH IS OVERRULED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES ONLY. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189
= 301/PJB/JW

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Oct-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION.
APPEARANCES: John B. Goldstein, Esq. of Brayton Purcell, LLP 898-1555 for pltf & opposing party; Conor Granahan, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP 438-5908 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE DUE TO DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO OBTAIN RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY DOES NOT DEMONSTRATE THAT HE IS UNABLE TO PROVE HIS CASE BASED ON EVIDENCE FROM OTHER SOURCES. Order signed in open court. (302/PJM/JW) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
